pages.text:
EMBASSY OF THE
UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
MADRID

THE AMBASSADOR
February 27, 1981

His Excellency
José Pedro Pérez-Llorca
Minister of Foreign Affairs
Madrid

Dear Mr. Minister and friend:

I have the honor to transmit to Your Excellency the attached message from the Honorable Alexander M. Haig, Secretary of State of the United States of America.

I am also enclosing with the message from Secretary of State of the United States of America.

fullText:
EMBASSY OF THE
UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
MADRID

THE AMBASSADOR
February 27, 1981

His Excellency
José Pedro Pérez-Llorca
Minister of Foreign Affairs
Madrid

Dear Mr. Minister and friend:

I have the honor to transmit to Your Excellency the attached message from the Honorable Alexander M. Haig, Secretary of State of the United States of America.

I am also enclosing with the message from Secretary of State of the United States of America.

-- 1 of 1 --
